<recommended_plugins>
Here is a list of plugins that are available but not installed. If the user's query would benefit from one of these plugins, use the `request_plugin_install` tool to suggest that they install it. Pass the parenthesized ID as `plugin_id`. For example, suggest the Google Drive plugin if the query could possibly be better answered with access to Google Drive.

- Atlassian Rovo (atlassian-rovo@openai-curated-remote)
- Box (box@openai-curated-remote)
- Gmail (gmail@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Calendar (google-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Calendar (outlook-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Email (outlook-email@openai-curated-remote)
- SharePoint (sharepoint@openai-curated-remote)
- Teams (teams@openai-curated-remote)
</recommended_plugins>
i want you to go through the codebase with 10 different code-reaper subagents and tell me what we should clean up in this codebase to make it more maintainable.

I’m applying the code-reaper workflow to the CLI/Git adapter slice, read-only. I’ll focus on verified duplication and ownership problems, then return only concrete, behavior-preserving cleanup candidates.

input.input: const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"sed -n '1,240p' /home/adam-blumoff/.agents/skills/code-reaper/SKILL.md","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);
const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"rg --files | sed -n '1,240p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);
const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"wc -l cli/src/*.rs cli/tests/*.rs | sort -nr","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"find cli/src -maxdepth 1 -type f -print | sort\nrg -n \"enum .*Command|match .*command|Command::|std::process|tokio::process|tempdir|NamedTemp|git \" cli/src cli/tests","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"find cli/src -type f -name '*.rs' -print0 | xargs -0 wc -l | sort -nr | head -40\nsed -n '1,240p' cli/src/bin/scope.rs\nsed -n '1,230p' cli/src/request.rs","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"rg -n \"^fn |^pub fn |ensure_git_repo_ready|ensure_clean_working_tree|ensure_request_branch_context\" cli/src/request.rs\nsed -n '230,874p' cli/src/bin/scope.rs","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);
const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"sed -n '1,540p' cli/src/api.rs\nsed -n '1,580p' cli/src/api/requests.rs","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"rg -n \"struct (RepoSummaryResponse|RepositoryAccessResponse|RepoRequestPermissionsResponse|RepoInitResponse|GitPushTokenResponse|RepoConfigResponse|RequestSummaryResponse|RequestPermissionsResponse|RequestMergeabilityResponse|RequestSettlementResponse|RequestEventResponse|DeviceLoginStartResponse|CliSessionTokenResponse|UserResponse)|enum (RepositoryActor|RepoPublicationState|RequestMergeabilityStatus|DeviceLoginStatus)\" api crates cli web/src | sed -n '1,240p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"sed -n '1,330p' api/src/http/responses.rs\nsed -n '1,180p' api/src/http/responses/requests.rs\nsed -n '1,120p' api/src/http/type_exports.rs","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);
const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"nl -ba cli/src/git_repo.rs | sed -n '1,760p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"nl -ba cli/src/clone.rs
nl -ba cli/src/push.rs | sed -n '1,390p'
nl -ba cli/src/request/local.rs | sed -n '1,390p'
nl -ba cli/src/request/remote.rs | sed -n '1,390p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"rg -n \"push_authenticated_remote|changed_paths_since_last_scope_push\\(|changed_paths_since_last_scope_push_at_commit|GitPushAuthPlan|GitFetchAuthPlan|GitCloneAuthPlan|git_clone_auth_plan|git_push_auth_plan|git_fetch_auth_plan|permissioned_git_remote_path|default_clone_dir\" --glob '*.rs'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"nl -ba cli/src/request.rs | sed -n '520,790p'\nnl -ba cli/src/api/requests.rs | sed -n '1,560p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"rg -n '^fn ' cli/src/bin/scope.rs\nrg -n '^pub fn |^fn ' cli/src/push.rs cli/src/auth.rs cli/src/repo_config.rs cli/src/request/local.rs cli/src/request/remote.rs","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"nl -ba cli/src/auth.rs | sed -n '1,300p'\nnl -ba cli/src/repo_config.rs | sed -n '200,330p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"for f in cli/tests/init.rs cli/tests/request.rs cli/tests/push.rs cli/tests/review.rs; do echo $f; rg -n '^struct TestDir|^impl TestDir|^impl Drop|^fn run_scope|^fn run_git|^fn assert_success|^fn assert_failure|^fn unix_nanos' $f; done\nsed -n '1,230p' cli/tests/init.rs\nsed -n '1,230p' cli/tests/request.rs","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"rg -n -- '--exchange|exchange_login|exchange-grants|headless|push_authenticated_remote|changed_paths_since_last_scope_push' README.md docs web api cli crates | sed -n '1,260p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);
const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"cat cli/src/lib.rs\ncat cli/Cargo.toml\ncat Cargo.toml","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"nl -ba api/src/http/routes.rs | sed -n '1,180p'\nrg -n 'format!\\(\"\\{api_url\\}/v1|const .*PATH' cli/src/api.rs cli/src/api/requests.rs api/src/http/routes.rs","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"sed -n '180,380p' api/src/http/routes.rs\nnl -ba cli/src/request/args.rs | sed -n '1,220p'\nnl -ba cli/src/request.rs | sed -n '35,200p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"rg -n '\\.(push_branch|push_token|identity|expires_at_unix|author_user_id|target_branch|base_main_oid|created_at_unix|updated_at_unix|resolved_at_unix|permissions)' cli/src --glob '*.rs' | sed -n '1,220p'\nrg -n 'CLI_BROWSER_LOGIN_EXCHANGE_PATH_TEMPLATE|CLI_DEVICE_LOGIN_POLL_PATH_TEMPLATE' cli/src cli/tests","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"nl -ba cli/src/api/tests.rs | sed -n '1,140p'\nrg -n 'ts_rs|export.*Type|types.generated' cli/src cli/tests cli/Cargo.toml","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"git status --short\nrg -n '^pub fn push_authenticated_remote|^pub fn changed_paths_since_last_scope_push|^pub fn changed_paths_since_last_scope_push_at_commit' cli/src\nrg -n 'push_authenticated_remote|changed_paths_since_last_scope_push' cli/src cli/tests --glob '*.rs'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"nl -ba api/src/http/responses/requests.rs | sed -n '45,145p'\nnl -ba api/src/http/responses.rs | sed -n '185,225p'\nnl -ba cli/src/api.rs | sed -n '20,190p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

content.text: Completed the read-only CLI/Git adapter audit and sent 10 verified findings with exact paths, priorities, risks, and cleanup recommendations. No files were changed; working tree was clean.
